message:
feat(node): implement migration audit command with JSON/text/SARIF output

Replace the stub `migrate audit` CLI command with a full implementation
that scans a project directory and produces a structured migration
audit report.

migration/mod.rs (+684 lines):
- AuditOutputFormat enum (json, text, sarif) with parse()
- MigrationSeverity, MigrationCategory, MigrationAuditFinding types
- MigrationAuditReport with summary and findings
- run_audit(): walks project tree counting JS/TS files, package
  manifests, lockfiles, and risky scripts; emits categorized findings
  for missing lockfiles, pinned dependencies, script risks, etc.
- render_audit_report(): formats to JSON, human-readable text, or
  SARIF v2.1.0 for IDE integration
- MAX_FINDINGS_PER_CATEGORY cap to prevent unbounded output

main.rs: Wire up run_audit/render_audit_report in the Migrate::Audit
handler with optional --out file writing and proper error context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
